videos.title: The Top 10 Dungeon Crawls of all Time (2024 edition)
videos.description:
In this episode I countdown my Top 10 Dungeon Crawls of all time. And just what is a dungeon crawl?

A dungeon crawl is a game in which the players move their characters through an enclosed space comprised of corridors, hallways, chambers, and rooms, or the characters are abstractly moving through a similar, dungeon-like environment. The dungeon does not need to be a literal dungeon, but it could be a spaceship, a cave, or even an old house. They tend to be more narrowly focused, with a zoomed-i

videos.description:
In this video I take a look at one thing I really like about Deities & Demigods, an original source book for AD&D. I wasn't allowed to have this book growing up, because of the original Satanic Panic in the US (Satan - tempting kids across the United States!). D&D was way too satanic for my Christian sensibilities! ;) So I had to sneak it...thus making the hobby even more dangerous and alluring!

#dungeonsanddragons #advanceddungeonsanddragons #solorpg #cthulhu

videos.title: Hobbycast Episode 7 - Ten Great Science Fiction Novels
videos.description:
To celebrate the focus on science fiction games during the Month of May, I present a podcast on Ten Great Science Fiction Novels. 

These Include:

The Stars My Destination - Alfred Bester

Way Station - Clifford D. Simak

The Martian Chronicles - Ray Bradbury

To Marry Medusa - Theodore Sturgeon

Version 43 - Phillip Palmer

The Carlucci Trilogy - Richard Paul Russo

Einstein's Dreams - Alan Lightman

Sirius - Olaf Stapledon

White Light - Rudy Rucker

Martian Time Slip - Philip K. Dick

videos.title: Revisiting Hand of Fate: Ordeals - A Game that Should have been a Massive Hit
videos.description:
Revisiting Hand of Fate: Ordeals - A Game that Should have been a Massive Hit


This game is the best deck-building adventure game. It's better than Clank, better than Thunderstone Quest. It should have been a huge success. It has everything a great game should have - solid and creative mechanisms, great art, and tons of theme. But too many people slept on it, and for that inferior games succeeded while this did not. It's a total shame.

videos.title: The Dark Tower I: The Gunslinger - The Ran(King) of King - Part 8
videos.description:
The Dark Tower I: The Gunslinger - The Ran(King) of King - Part 8


We're to the big one, guys. The Dark Tower. My favorite book series. How will these rank? Quite highly! Every month for the next 7 months, I will be reading and reviewing a book from the Dark Tower series. This is my fifth or so time through the series, and I expect to discover more during this journey.

videos.title: Dungeon Degenerates: The Hand of Doom - Discussion and Look at the Pulp Art Tradition
videos.description:
I hesitate to call this a proper review. My review of Dungeon Degenerates in a single sentence is, I love this game. This is a long, rambling look at the game in which I discuss the pulp and outsider art traditions, and why I think the DD is an important extension of those traditions, and why the game is important to me on a level that few, if any other games, reach.

With The Dungeon Dive, I am hoping to foster a different kind of discussion around the hobby of board and analog games. There are

videos.title: Dungeon Degenerates - Let's Play - Establishing a Base - Part 5
videos.description:
Thanks for watching this warts and all play through of...Dungeon Degenerates!

I forgot the encounter card after the fight! It was no big deal. It was an Albino Scrog, and I would have chosen to "ignore it & leave it in peace," seeing as how my Brawler was hurting so bad. So all that was missed was a few sentences of flavor text! :)

videos.title: Dungeon Degenerates - Let's Play - Establishing a Base - Part 4
videos.description: Numbers are hard! Ha ha. Had a complete brain fart on the Skull Spider fight. It had been a long day! Anyhow, enough damage was done, and in the end the foe was rightfully vanquished. Just ignore the numbers I say after the first attack.

videos.title: Dungeon Degenerates - Let's Play - Establishing a Base - Part 2
videos.description:
A couple of corrections to note:

Right after I finished recording, I realized that the BS Brawler was not able to buy the LOOT skill because she doesn't meet the class requirements. We will address that.

Also, the first time the Hand of Doom is placed in a region, we are supposed to shuffle that region's monster deck with its discards. We will do that on the next video.

Dungeon Degenerates - Let's Play - Establishing a Base - Part 1

Icon on Danger card at 23:30 is actually VOID space, NOT Metaphysical. Just confused the two. Doesn't change anything for the card, because we weren't on either. Everything gets corrected properly in the video.
